title: Cosmic Negation locks all Magic after destroy

card.rawText: Destroy all magic cards on the field. Magic cards cannot be played for 3 turn cycles.

plan.title: Cosmic Negation locks all Magic after destroy
plan.summary: Play Cosmic Negation and verify its follow-up restriction prevents both players from playing Magic for 3 turn cycles.

notes: Pre-place Demonic Magic and Dragon's Bane on field before Cosmic Negation is played.
Play this card from your hand so the destroy-all-magic sentence resolves before the after-destroy restriction.
Resolve Cosmic Negation's destroy-all-magic effect, then apply its all-player Magic play restriction.

steps: Resolve the destroy all magic cards effect.
Apply the after-destroy Magic play restriction to all players.
manualVerification: Confirm neither player can play Magic cards until the 3-turn-cycle restriction expires.
riskNotes: This fixture verifies the follow-up restriction application and target scope. The existing E01 fixture covers field-wide Magic destruction.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Cosmic Negation's all-player Magic play restriction after destroying field Magic.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
